_comment: PLACEHOLDER — Replace this file with your actual credentials_master.json. The example.json is the only credentials file that is safe to commit to git.
_how_to_obtain_master: The real master file is shared via a secure channel (NOT via git). It contains real private keys for live Google service accounts.
_loader_module: googleDrive/credentials_loader.py — loads ALL secrets from credentials_master.json IN MEMORY. No scattered JSON files are generated.

_schema.service_accounts.sa_1_drive_automation.j: Service Account #1 (Google Drive access) — paste the full contents of the downloaded JSON key file here
_schema.service_accounts.sa_2_sheet_automation.j: Service Account #2 (Google Sheets access) — paste the full contents of the downloaded JSON key file here
_schema.oauth_client.json_content: OAuth2 client config (the 'installed' key from client_secret_*.json) — paste here
env_file_content.content: Line-by-line KEY=VALUE entries from the env file
_schema.google_drive_folder_map.depots[].name: Depot name (BARISHAL, CHATTOGRAM, ... SYLHET)
_schema.google_drive_folder_map.depots[].folder_: Drive folder ID for this depot
_schema.google_drive_folder_map.depots[].data_fo: Sub-folder inside that contains ERPonTheNet_Data.MDF + ERPonTheNet_log.LDF (optional, fill if known)
_schema.google_sheets.master_field_force_sheet.s: Google Sheets ID for the master field-force roster
_schema._sole_gmail_account.login_email: The single Gmail address that owns all of the above (for documentation)

_git_status: credentials_master.example.json IS git-tracked as the schema reference
On a fresh clone, you MUST bring credentials_master.json from a secure channel BEFORE running the project
_post_clone_verification: python googleDrive/credentials_loader.py   (prints SA + OAuth + env + folder IDs — should all succeed)
